race.comment: WESTBOUND (2) finished strongly in the Raconteur but couldn't get close in the Guineas last start, finishing 4.2L off the winner. Getting out in trip now looks a big tick for him and CJP reuniting is a big push for his chances. Can see him back to his best now and that'll make things hard for his rivals. LINCHPIN (5) flew home to win two back before tackling the Guineas last start. He hit the line alongside WESTBOUND there and steps out to 2000m for the first time, though his breeding suggests it should suit. Looks to get every chance and a forward showing is on the cards. SPELLBORN (4) just missed two back over the mile before finishing 4.7L away in the Guineas most recently. Out to 2000m is the query, but he wasn't far off WESTBOUND and LINCHPIN last time. Can make his presence felt. SPECIAL COUNSEL (8) looks ready for the rise in trip now and Pike's booking is a positive sign. FIERY SPARK (3) can't be left out of calculations.
